examples: This isn't highfalutin art-about-art. It's marvellous and adventurous stuff.
There are better, less highfalutin explanations.
Did that young man who spoke so highfalutin 'get her?
Romney was characterizing his opponent as Olympian, highfalutin and out of touch with reality.
Fancy enough that some people in KC knock Jack Stack for being too highfalutin.
